reviews.review_description:
Pretty fun experience.  I played the Spider room quite a few times and showed it off to some people.  
My only negative experience with this game is second room selection.  For some reason I was unable to place the (virtual)TV prop on the wall in the room.  Every time I tried to place it on the wall(by using the trigger button), it would place it BEHIND the wall and out of sight.  So when I'd try to start the game that uses the TV, I couldn't see the TV, so that "room" is useless.  I tried placing it on all of the walls, but no luck.  The dimensions of the room I'm playing in is about 12ft x 12ft...and I never have issues with any of the other Quest games in this room.  
Disappointing.  
So I could only play half of the game.  
But honestly, the Spider Room was worth the $5 alone.  I'd give this game a solid 5-Stars rating, but since that TV bug exists, I'll only give it 4-Stars.

*****UPDATE (9 months later).  I've been waiting rather patiently for the THIRD UPDATE...but still, there is no THIRD feature.  It has remained in the "Coming Soon" status.  
Someone who also reviewed this game back in August 2025 had expressed their same frustration in the delay of that 3rd update.  The developer had responded to them with "Good news, we’re working on the 3rd experience right now and aiming to release it before Halloween!"  
WELL, Halloween was 5 months ago now.  
So I'm gonna decrease my rating from 4 Stars down to 2 Stars...based solely on the fact that the Dev lied.  
I don't like liars.
I can’t seem to get past the place the tv on the wall setup feature.  I place it there and no matter where I put it nothing happens and I can’t get past this step.

reviews.review_title: What little there is, is awesome!
reviews.review_description: Great set of demos, both of them. The whole mixed VR thing works really, really well. The spiders section was a lot of fun, and I genuinely found myself ducking out of the way of hanging and jumping spiders. The ghost section was also incredible, with a few of the jump scares actually having me scream out loud. For what it is, it's awesome, just wish there was more of it!

I have bought this game over 6 months. No updates on the 3rd and last update.

Updates: 1 year after. Still no update. 1 star.

Comes up saying you need to scan the room, gives an Early access discalmer and then says it failed to scan the room without even seemingly trying to or prompting anything.

Atleast it was cheap, but I wouldn't recommend until this gets fixed

reviews.review_title: Can't get the "television" game to work
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed the spider game. Challenging, but not impossible, and disturbing without being too scary.  But no matter what I do, I can't get the second game (the one about the television) to work. The game tells me to use the remote control to turn on the TV, but no matter what button I push, nothing happens. I've even held the remote right in front of the TV, tried every button, and nothing.

I've just downloaded this and have a few issues already.  When setting up the room,  some objects that I need to move and interact with are outside the playing area and I can't get outside the boundary to grab them. Also, the one time I did manage to interact with the objects to set the room up,  it just continually loads,  telling me the room is initialising. Frustrating and useless so far sadly.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! Great news, this has been fixed in the latest update - just make sure you have a valid room scan as the game requires it.

reviews.review_description: Game is fun need more weapons spiders need to be updated that big when you really updated on a graphics and polished Wednesday next experience coming out the 3rd one I haven't seen an update for this game in a minute but at all when the next experience coming out

Can't get to work. Keeps saying to rescan the room. Fix the bugs to make scanning better.
New to q3 and so glad got this proper jumpy would highly recommend for anyone who loves a quick jump scare

reviews.review_description: This game is really scary. I switched to the spiders and man I was screaming that I finally turned it off.
I missed such a great experience since the Face Your Fears on Samsung Gear VR. Great to finally have something similar on Oculus Quest 3!

I definitely would make a purchase for a version that’s a full game experience.

More weapons like a flame thrower and  lots of different waves with different types of spiders….

   I’ll reserve a few stars for the final product
I’m a newbie at VR, but found this game easy to play plus it had its share of thrills when the woman comes out of your TV. Try going up to her. Highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: Fun jump scares in the zombie game
reviews.review_description: The zombie scene is fun at parties when you can watch people get jump scared!  I just wish there was more to it than the 3 minutes of gameplay on that level.     The MR part of the game is awesome,  but not perfect.    The TV issue is definitely present, where it places the TV behind the wall, but I've found places where I can put it and it works.
The experiences were both creepy in their own way. I personally found the 2nd experience more intense than the first. A great use of MR that leaves you feeling uncomfortable in your own room!
Will not show up on my apps!
Bang bang bang!

Well for some reason the game wont
 dowload to my quest. And wont even come up in a search on my headset. And nobody can tell me why ive updaed my headset reset it multipule times logged out, and still nothing
It's a short horror thrill I'm not doing the spider one 💀 I done the other one really good but the spider one I can't handle spiders but good Job add in some more levels

Know up front this currently contains two short experiences but is priced appropriately with more promised to come.  This is great to show off the mixed reality in vr but can be intense defiantly not for an arachnaphobic.  Loved how this seamlessly integrated with my room in mixed reality I was really creeped out by the spiders all over my wall.  Got some laughs from the guy on the phone.  Great attention to detail like in the one level the leaking water reacts to your hands and bends like falling water should.  This is cool and well done although short, can't wait to see what they come up with next.
Got me screaming the first time and i had fun scaring my daughter too lol hoping for more experiences!!!

reviews.review_title: Enough with the eternally cute MR apps!
reviews.review_description:
Without spoiling the experience, I'll just say I now see my room differently - and I might be sleeping with the lights on for a while.

This experience makes perfect use of the room setup and realistically extends the perspective to what may be lurking on the other side. The room destruction was so convincing that my mind fully accepted it as reality - especially early on, when only cracks appeared. I thought I knew all the horror tropes but experiencing them right in my own space was a whole new thrill!

This is a perfect game to scare yourself and friends and family, particularly the boastful ones who claim nothing can shock them. Start the experience, hand over the headset, and watch them squirm... 😈

reviews.review_title: Arachnophobia is real even in VR!!!!
reviews.review_description: I'm ok with spiders, sure they creep me out some but for the most part I'm ok with them. I am a huge fan of mixed reality though and the filters to make the world blend better are something I've not seen in any other game I've played. So I setup the room and handed the headset to the wifey who IS NOT ok with spiders... Let's just say, I think I'll be sleeping on the couch for the foreseeable future. This is a great new party game for people to try, right up there with Richie's plank experience.

reviews.review_title: Jump scares for friends and family
reviews.review_description: I'm not embarrassed to say that this delivered some serious jump scares, and a healthy amount of heebie jeebies. The room destruction paired with the dynamic lighting is top notch, with a fantastic feeling of immersion. I don't want to spoil some of the scares and visuals in this; they deserve to be experienced fresh. This is a great choice for a game to show off Quest 3 Color Passthrough to people who haven't tried that yet. Just make sure to record the gameplay so you can enjoy their jumps and creep-outs. The controls are simple and intuitive , and it runs smooth for how much is going on (it's a lot!) on the Quest 3. I'm really looking forward to the upcoming game mode and hope it can offer something that will give it some return gameplay, or who knows maybe even multiplayer. I think it's at just the right price point for what it is, and when the new mode is released, should be even better value. Scare your folks, it'll be great to watch. :)

Panic Room has a lot of potential in its early access phase, featuring two demo-like experiences for a fair price of £3.99. I’m definitely curious to see how it evolves during this period. Will we see longer scenarios for future frights, and how many more will be introduced? If they can pull this off, it could resemble the fantastic Face Your Fears but in Mixed Reality, making the experience feel more immersive than ever. At this price, it’s definitely a great choice if you want to impress your friends and family with MR while enjoying the fun of watching them get scared.

As people say, this is a great way to show off the Quest 3/3s to people who haven't experienced VR before.

It's one thing to have a typical VR experience with a "realistic" environment, it's completely different to see your actual surroundings, and see something on your own TV. The details are great.

As others have mentioned, this isn't a game you'll play every day... it's maybe ten minutes of fun. But well worth it, especially if you use it to show off your Quest!

A fantastic use of the technology.  Very cleverly done, particularly the attention to detail setting the lighting up to match the lighting of your play area.  Of course this arachnophobe chose the spiders and very quickly started to regret it.  It'll be great to see where this goes in the future.

reviews.review_title: Perfect 4 “So this is your 1st MR exp?”
reviews.review_description:
I got this knowing it’s replay value as a Quest owner may be questionable (unless the developer pumps out new environments on a regular basis).

HOWEVER after doing a full run through of both currently available experiences, I can confidently say Panic Room is perfect for anyone coming over who has never tried MR/VR before to give them a real treat of “wow”.

This MR app, combined with Richie’s Plank Experience for VR, are the perfect marriage of experiences that one would have to get through before trying anything else in my headset.

“Go To her”…🫣

Well done!
The game is very boring. Not that scary
This isn’t scary, I got a jump scare from the zombie lady one but that’s it. The levels are short too, u complete it in 10 minutes (the whole game 2x levels)
$%#@ this game, got me quick ......horribly awesome to share with noobs. Just have your phone on the ready to record!
I really like this experience. It's fun and scary at the same time. I look forward to more modes.
I'm afraid of spiders, so yes, it was scary. I will never play it again, I guess... :)

With the cheap price just to experience the Mix reality and hoping they add more experience. The spider game did get a little to full on and I was just shooting for the fun of it hoping to hit things.
This game is very well made, and it’s super polished. Looking forward to seeing new updates coming to this!
Love to see more of these games. Shatter is fantastic too in MR mixed reality
the game feels really great! we are all afraid to sleep in the bedroom today ;PP

PROS: Price + Good ambience + Mixed reality works very well in the 2 experiences
CONS: The girl's experience is very short + The 2 experiences are repetitives + Girl gives you the creeps only at the beginning and there isn't dark enough

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback - we are listening!
As this is early access right now and quite short, this is currently reflected in the price. 
However, we plan on adding more experiences and making improvements where possible in the near future and look forward building on this.

Thanks again for your review.

reviews.review_description:
I think the spider portion of the game would be terrifying if I were afraid of spiders; this part is really well done.

But the Samara wannabe is laughable.
It was a great experience
Was so excited to play the game it didn't work for a good while then it eventually played. Would be nice to have more choices than just 2 games you can play
as a person who dont play a lot of Mixed reality, i really enjoyed my time with this, truly a great game
I hope to see more of panic room. It's one of the best visual games.
Great for getting rid of arachnophobia

developer_response.body: Glad the game is working for you now. Thank you for updating the review!

reviews.review_description:
Im a big fan of horror games and i am not easily scared. But this ones is a different story. Great use of MR as it introduces freshness to the genre.
Really love the idea and i look forward to play new experiences!!

quality > quantity. It is more of a demo-style experience, but it's more polished than some of the big titles on the store. Spiders was more fun but Demons truly made my heart skip a beat. Curious to see what they add next. What this game is really about, though, is freaking other people out! I had my girlfriend play it and her yells were priceless. Can't wait to put my mom in the panic room at christmas XD. 10/10 value for money
Great experience for a meeting with friends who like to experience the thrill of fear, I can't wait for more mini-games based on cult horrors!
